---
title: "eds240-infographic"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(janitor)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
recipes <- read.csv("data/recipes_reviews/recipes.csv")
```

```{r}
colnames(recipes)
```

```{r}
# Install if not already installed
#install.packages("arrow")

# Load the package
library(arrow)
```

```{r}
# 
reviews <- read_parquet("data/recipes_reviews/reviews.parquet")

# View the first few rows
head(reviews)
```
```{r}
review_cy <- reviews[reviews$AuthorName == "Cyclopz",]
```


```{r}
head(recipes)
```

```{r}
# Veryfy

recipe_cy <- recipes[recipes$AuthorName == "Cyclopz",]

```

```{r}
#combined_df <- left_join(recipes, reviews, by = "AuthorName", relationship = "many-to-many")
```
